Name: FVolumeControlStyle
Description: Represents the appearance of an SVolumeControl

Variables.Name: SliderStyle
Variables.Description: The style of the volume control slider

Variables.Name: HighVolumeImage
Variables.Description: Image to use when the volume is set to high

Variables.Name: MidVolumeImage
Variables.Description: Image to use when the volume is set to mid-range

Variables.Name: LowVolumeImage
Variables.Description: Image to use when the volume is set to low

Variables.Name: NoVolumeImage
Variables.Description: Image to use when the volume is set to off

Variables.Name: MutedImage
Variables.Description: Image to use when the volume is muted
